title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and list local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for prompt templates, retrieval, agents, and more.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); markdown, code highlighting, model manager.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that connects Copilot-like autocomplete to your local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, featuring syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and configurable model preload.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama exposing sync/async APIs, streaming, and embeddings for Spring/Android.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama + Chroma for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Official docs and helper scripts for running Ollama with NVIDIA GPUs (CUDA & cuDNN).

title: ollama-ansible
summary: Ansible role to install Ollama, pull models, and configure systemd service on Ubuntu/Debian.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 component providing Generator and Embedder nodes backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama; supports multiple models, conversation history export.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package that wraps Ollama’s REST API for native macOS/iOS apps using async/await.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of docker-compose stacks pairing Ollama with Open-WebUI, Nextcloud, and Nginx proxy.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a sidebar chat powered by your local Ollama model for note brainstorming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for chatting with Ollama models, including real-time streaming and embeddings.
